changelog: FIX (DEV ONLY): Removed the '▶ SPORTSNET 360' channel chip from the bottom of every game card. With the no-scores fallback layout (badge + team name underneath), the team names were visually overlapping the chip — there wasn't enough vertical room in a 200dp card for both a centered badge-plus-name and a bottom-pinned chip. Per user direction, the chip is gone entirely; pressing OK on the focused card still plays the matched channel, so the chip was duplicative info anyway.
